Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It looks like Fuuka's room...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 102 11 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}I wonder if I should have gone for the one-piece suit instead.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 102 11 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}These halter top bikinis look almost like underwear...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 102 11 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}It feels a little weird to have my belly button exposed.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 102 11 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}Now that I think about it, this is the first time I've chosen my own swimsuit.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 102 11 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}But there wasn't much of a selection for the one-pieces...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 102 11 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}Hm, I wonder if I should ask Yukari-chan again what she thinks.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 6 102 11 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}Although... I don't really exercise, so I probably wouldn't look very good standing next to her...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 102 11 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}Oh, right! I have just the thing![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 102 11 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}The low-frequency waist slimmer pad I bought from Tanaka's TV show![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 102 11 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}It said online it was very effective for its price, so maybe it could do some help before the trip.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 102 11 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}Now let's see... How do I turn this on?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 102 11 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}I-It tickles! Hahahaha... What do I do!? Hahaha! Ahahahahaha![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}Yamagishi, do you have a moment?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 102 11 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}Ah! It's Kirijo-senpa— Hahaha! I-I have to get the door...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}Oh, um... Am I interrupting anything?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 11 102 11 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}N-No, not at— Heehee... No, not at all... Hahahaha...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}It's... not that important. Um, never mind. Just... carry on.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 11 102 11 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}Aaaah! Heeheeee! Someone help![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The recording ends here...[n]{f 1 1}
